revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{Commonscat}} {{Year by category |m=1 |c=9 |d=0 |y=8 |cat=各月 |sortkey=かくつき |parent=各年の各月 }}」

revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[ja:Category:1908年の各月]] [[ar:Category:أحداث 1908 حسب الشهر]] [[be:Category:Месяцы 1908 года]] [[commons:Category:1908 by month]] [[fr:Category:Mois de 1908]] [[ko:Category:1908년의 달]] [[ru:Category:1908 год по месяцам]] [[uk:Category:Місяці 1908]] [[zh:Category:1908年各月]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - ": (Text replacement - "" to ""
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - ")links on [[:Category" to "links on " to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on ." to "[[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]]"

Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Text replacement - "[[Category:[[Category:" to "[[Category:"
Text replacement - "↵]]↵" to ""
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"

Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
Removing from [[Category:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on .]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[en:Category:Category:" to "[[en:Category:"
Text replacement - "[[ja:Category:Category:" to "[[ja:Category:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Commons category}} {{Year events by month category header}}
[[ar:Category:أحداث 1908 حسب الشهر]] [[ar:Category:تصنيف:أحداث 1908 حسب الشهر]] [[be:Category:Катэгорыя:Месяцы 1908 года]] [[be:Category:Месяцы 1908 года]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[commons:Category:1908 by month]] [[commons:Category:Category:1908 by month]] [[en:Category:1908 by month]] [[en:Category:1908 by month]] [[fr:Category:Catégorie:Mois de 1908]] [[fr:Category:Mois de 1908]] [[ja:Category:1908年の各月]] [[ja:Category:1908年の各月]] [[ko:Category:1908년의 달]] [[ko:Category:분류:1908년의 달]] [[ru:Category:1908 год по месяцам]] [[ru:Category:Категория:1908 год по месяцам]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:September_1908]] [[uk:Category:Категорія:Місяці 1908]] [[uk:Category:Місяці 1908]] [[zh:Category:1908年各月]] [[zh:Category:Category:1908年各月]]
